scope: Call participant-state duplicate-submit and concurrent same-state idempotency.
expected: Repeating the same participant state is a heartbeat/noop success: it may refresh participant presence, but must not emit another participant transition event or another participant-state audit. A real state transition must still emit the matching event and audit once.

redEvidence.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.db.test.ts -t "keeps duplicate participant state updates"
redEvidence.observed: Failed before fix: after an initial joined transition, two duplicate joined requests both returned fresh participant_joined events instead of event=null; each duplicate would also create duplicate transition side effects.

actual: Pass: initial joined emits participant_joined, duplicate concurrent joined requests return 200 with event=null and joined readback, final left emits participant_left, persisted state has one reader row in left state, events contain one participant_joined and one participant_left, and audit contains two transition entries total.
codeChanges: apps/api/src/communications/callDataSource.ts includes listCallParticipantStates in the call workspace datasource contract.

apps/api/src/communications/callWorkspace.ts reads the current participant state inside the existing active-session transaction lock, updates lastSeenAt through upsert, and emits call event/audit only when the state actually changes.
apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.ts serializes noop participant-state responses as event: null instead of a fake transition event.
packages/persistence/src/collaborationRepository.ts preserves first leftAt timestamp for repeated left/removed states while still clearing leftAt on rejoin.
apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.db.test.ts adds DB/API coverage for duplicate joined, final left transition, persisted state readback, event counts, and audit counts.

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/communicationRealtimeRoutes.db.test.ts -t "keeps duplicate participant state updates"
verification.notes: Vitest emitted the existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice.

coverageImpact: Fixes and covers call participant-state duplicate/noop side effects at DB/API level. This narrows the media/write-flow risk but does not replace real LiveKit/Jitsi browser/provider traversal.
